---
sec: internat-lille
title: "L'Internat à Lille"
description: "Informations pratiques sur l'internat de santé publique à Lille"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

{{< include ../_setup.qmd >}}

::: {.page-content}

::: {.page-main}
`r knit_section()`
:::

::: {.page-sidebar}
### Agenda (pour test)
```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=example"
  height="500"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
```
```{=html}
<a href="../blog/test/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <img
    src="../_img/apero-info.png"
    alt="Apéro info"
    loading="lazy">
</a>
```
### encore un truc
```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://example.com"
  height="500"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
```
:::

:::
